title: uia_send_keys
description: Send keyboard shortcuts or special-key sequences to the target window. For plain text use type_text instead.

keys.description: Key sequence in pywinauto / SendKeys notation. Spaces are typed literally. Special keys: {ENTER} {TAB} {ESC} {BACKSPACE} {DELETE} {HOME} {END} {UP} {DOWN} {LEFT} {RIGHT} {F1}-{F12}. Modifier prefixes: ^ = Ctrl (^s = Ctrl+S), + = Shift (+{F10}), % = Alt (%f = Alt+F, %{F4} = Alt+F4). Repeat: {TAB 3}. Literal special chars: {^} {+} {%} {~} {(} {)} {{} {}}. Examples: '^s' saves, '%f' opens File menu, '%{F4}' closes window.

target.description: Optional element to focus before sending keys.
